title: Senior Threat Hunter · Microsoft — Defender Experts (DEX)
description: Hunts nation-state actors and phishing/malware-as-a-service operations at scale across cloud, endpoint, and network telemetry for thousands of enterprise customers — turning every finding into durable, deployable KQL and YARA detections.

title: International Conference Speaker
description: Sharing threat hunting and detection engineering research with the community on the conference stage, including SECCON 14 (Tokyo) and CyberLab Con 2026.

title: AI Security Research
description: Expanding research into AI security — mapping how living-off-the-land and adversarial techniques apply to AI systems and tooling, and building AI-assisted investigative workflows for threat hunting.

title: Open Source Contributions
description: Contributing to community open-source security projects — including a merged SigmaHQ detection rule, LOLBAS and the LOLAI project, and a published Exploit-DB GHDB dork — alongside a personal detection rules repository.

title: Cloud Security Researcher III · Hyland
description: Built a cloud Security Operations Center from the ground up — defining IR workflows, detection engineering, CSPM, and vulnerability management across hybrid AWS and Azure environments.

title: Community Workshops & Guest Sessions
description: Delivered cyber security workshops and guest sessions at engineering colleges and universities — including KBC North Maharashtra University (Jalgaon) and Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering for Women (Pune).

title: Senior Threat Researcher · LTIMindtree (Microsoft XDR)
description: Led threat detection and hunting for Microsoft XDR customers using KQL, custom YARA signatures, and MITRE ATT&CK across cloud-native and endpoint telemetry — building detections for pre-ransomware activity, loaders, and lateral movement.

title: Security Researcher · Persistent Systems
description: Performed full-stack vulnerability assessments and red-team penetration testing for enterprise clients, authoring risk-driven remediation reports. Recognised as a "Standout Performer."
